objectives: Understand basic Python syntax and data types.
Write simple Python scripts.
Learn about variables, operators, and control flow.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Python for Beginners

objectives: Learn the basics of JavaScript syntax.
Manipulate the Document Object Model (DOM).
Implement event handling in web pages.

objectives: Understand fundamental programming paradigms.
Learn about algorithms and data structures.
Explore different approaches to problem-solving through code.
learning_path.title: Core Programming Concepts

objectives: Understand the challenges of data migration.
Learn common data migration patterns.
Explore tools and best practices for migrating existing data.
learning_path.title: Data Migration Strategies and Techniques

objectives: Understand the core concepts of Erlang.
Learn about processes and message passing.
Build simple concurrent applications in Erlang.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Erlang for Concurrent Systems

objectives: Learn Ruby syntax and object-oriented features.
Develop web applications using Ruby frameworks.
Write efficient Ruby scripts.
learning_path.title: Ruby Programming for Web and Scripting

objectives: Understand Java syntax and core libraries.
Develop object-oriented applications in Java.
Learn about Java's platform independence.
learning_path.title: Java Programming Fundamentals

objectives: Understand the principles of logic programming.
Write Prolog programs to solve problems.
Explore backtracking and unification.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Prolog for Logic Programming

objectives: Learn Perl syntax and regular expressions.
Write scripts for file manipulation and text processing.
Understand Perl's strengths in system administration tasks.
learning_path.title: Perl Scripting for Text Processing and System Administration

objectives: Explore the pure object-oriented nature of Smalltalk.
Learn Smalltalk syntax and message passing.
Understand the Smalltalk environment and development process.
learning_path.title: Smalltalk: An Object-Oriented Programming Language

objectives: Understand the fundamentals of assembly language.
Learn basic assembly instructions and addressing modes.
Write simple programs in assembly.
learning_path.title: Assembly Language Programming Basics

objectives: Learn the basics of the R programming language.
Perform statistical analysis and data visualization in R.
Understand R data structures and functions.

objectives: Learn Groovy syntax and its advantages over Java.
Write concise and powerful scripts in Groovy.
Understand Groovy's integration with the Java ecosystem.

objectives: Understand the core principles of object-oriented design.
Learn to create object-oriented models.
Apply object-oriented concepts to software design.
learning_path.title: Object-Oriented Modeling Principles

objectives: Learn the fundamentals of TypeScript.
Understand static typing and its benefits.
Write robust and maintainable JavaScript applications with TypeScript.

matched_occupation.description: Mobile application developers implement applications software for mobile devices, based on the designs provided, using general or specific development tools for device operating systems.
matched_occupation.label: mobile application developer
